audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches `Tên tôi là N`, meaning “My name is N.” The five short profiles also reuse Chapter 1 sentences about identity.
audienceSections.expert:
This chapter adds `tên + tôi + là + N`, the fixed beginner frame “My name is
N.” It reuses Chapter 1 identity statements in five short written profiles.

audienceSections.normal:
#### tên + tôi + là + N

Use this full pattern to say your name: `Tên tôi là Maria Garcia.` The words follow the order “name + I + is + name.” Learn the whole pattern together for now.
audienceSections.expert:
#### tên + tôi + là + N

Use this fixed frame to state your name. Vietnamese places `tôi` after `tên`
without a word equivalent to English “of.” This chapter makes only the full
frame productive; it does not introduce a general possession system.

audienceSections.normal: Keep the spaces and marks in `người nước ngoài`, `người Việt Nam`, and `nhân viên văn phòng`. In this Northern Vietnamese family, `bố` means “father.” Other regions may use a different family word.
audienceSections.expert:
Keep the spaces and diacritics in the complete entries `người nước ngoài`,
`người Việt Nam`, and `nhân viên văn phòng`. `bố` is natural in the Northern
family context established for the Nguyễn family. Other regional family terms
remain outside this lesson.

characters.heading: Sino-Vietnamese Vocabulary
characters.normal:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| nhân viên văn phòng | 人員文房 | office worker | `Tôi là nhân viên văn phòng.` |

The characters show the word parts in this job phrase. Modern Vietnamese normally writes the phrase with the Vietnamese alphabet.
characters.expert:
| Word | Characters | Meaning | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| nhân viên văn phòng | 人員文房 | office worker | `Tôi là nhân viên văn phòng.` |

Expert context: **nhân viên** corresponds to 人員 and **văn phòng** to 文房. The latter has developed from a study or writing room to an office; the full row records morpheme correspondence, not a claim about current Chinese wording.

entries.usage: Tôi là nhân viên văn phòng.
